Uses of Interface
io.github.igorgf.function.CheckedFunction

Packages that use CheckedFunction
Package
Description
io.github.igorgf.control
Core functional control-flow types for error handling and value presence.
io.github.igorgf.function
Checked functional interfaces for use with the control flow types in io.github.igorgf.control.
